projects.name: Erzurum — Doğu Ekspres Turizm ve Kayak Bölgesi
projects.name_en: Erzurum — Eastern Express Tourism & Ski Zone
projects.summary_en: Erzurum Palandöken ski resort among Turkey's best — 3,176m altitude. Eastern Express train route viral tourism phenomenon driving hospitality investment. Winter sports complex expansion approved.
projects.summary_ru: Горнолыжный курорт Паландёкен в Эрзуруме — один из лучших в Турции, высота 3176 м. Туристический феномен поезда Восточный Экспресс стимулирует инвестиции в гостеприимство.
projects.summary_ar: منتجع التزلج بالاندوكن في أرضروم — من أفضل المنتجعات في تركيا بارتفاع 3176 م. ظاهرة القطار الشرقي السياحية تدفع الاستثمار في الضيافة.
projects.summary_tr: Erzurum Palandöken kayak merkezi Türkiye'nin en iyileri arasında — 3.176m irtifa. Viral turizm fenomeni Doğu Ekspres treni konaklama yatırımını tetikliyor.

key_events.event_en: Eastern Express goes viral — 300% booking surge
New boutique hotel zone — 50 licenses issued

risk_factors: Severe winter weather limits construction season
projects.tradia_verdict: WATCH — Palandöken ski hotel land for tourism investors. Long-term hold only. Eastern Express demand sustaining year-round interest.

projects.name: Malatya — Kayısı ve Gıda İşleme Sanayi
projects.name_en: Malatya — Apricot & Food Processing Industrial Zone
projects.summary_en: Malatya produces 65% of world's dried apricots. Food processing OSB expanding with EU export certification. Industrial land affordable entry point with steady appreciation.
projects.summary_ru: Малатья производит 65% мирового объёма сушёного абрикоса. ОИЗ пищевой промышленности расширяется с сертификацией ЕС. Промышленные земли — доступная точка входа со стабильным ростом.
projects.summary_ar: ملاطية تنتج 65% من مشمش العالم المجفف. منطقة الصناعات الغذائية الصناعية تتوسع بشهادات التصدير الأوروبية.
projects.summary_tr: Malatya dünya kuru kayısısının yüzde 65'ini üretiyor. Gıda işleme OSB'si AB ihracat sertifikasyonuyla genişliyor.

key_events.event_en: EU geographic indication — Malatya apricot certified
OSB Phase 2 — 80 new food processing lots

projects.tradia_verdict: WATCH — Niche agricultural industrial play. Suitable for patient domestic capital. Not recommended for international investors seeking liquid exit.
